applications.name: content-skills plugin
applications.description: Single plugin-source repository with Claude and Codex manifests, commands under commands/. No skills directory — this repo only has slash commands.

manifest_validator.description: Validates required Claude/Codex plugin manifest fields, shared identity metadata, semver, and commands path.

version_bump_check.description: Checks Claude/Codex version parity and verifies the shared plugin version is greater than origin/main.

validator_tests.description: Unit tests for manifest validation and version-bump parsing behavior.

commands.description: Slash commands for GTM content creation and strategy maintenance.

key_directories.commands/: All command files owned by this plugin repo

validation_notes: `codex plugin marketplace add .` should fail in this plugin source repo because marketplace registration belongs to a marketplace root.
